title: Boss Refreshed
description: Minecraft's Bosses with a Refreshed Take!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54bea2f10fe7d0be1130c9cc3142b30006f749f3.png)

## Thank you all so much for 5 million (Curseforge) downloads!!

# About:

Boss Refreshed is a texture pack for recent versions that aims to take the Minecraft Bosses in a more epic and detailed route. The models are now more detailed, ferocious, and creepy. This is the perfect texture pack for those who want their Minecraft to feel more like an epic adventure with powerful monsters to face.

# Attention:
This pack was made with Entity Model Features. It may still work on Optifine, but that is no longer the supported mod to use for this pack.

Download Entity Model Features for Forge/Fabric [here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions)

Thank you to Joosh_7889 and GogoMines for inspiring me with their amazing Wither, find it at [Better Mob Models!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-mob-models)
Also, big thanks to Lanostry for inspiring me with their jaw dropping Red Dragon, give them a follow on their [Twitter/X.](https://x.com/lanostry?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor)
